title: <$tableName>
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: <$tableName> The entity's supertype. <$tableName> Values Name of the entity's supertype Scope Entity and field triggers. Description The <$tableName> compile-time constant corresponds to the entity's supertype. (This corresponds to the name of the table where these entities are stored in the Uniface Repository.)
